description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like figure dressed in an elaborate, deep purple robe adorned with intricate lavender patterns and accents. The head is topped with a large, pointed, bishop-like hat decorated with circular motifs and matching purple hues. The doll has pale skin, straight silver hair styled into two long side ponytails, and a stoic face with large, dark blue eyes. It holds a tall, ornate staff with a faceted, gem-like top and geometric designs, echoing the mystical theme. The sleeves and hem of the robe are wide and detailed, and the overall silhouette is both regal and fantastical. The back of the doll reveals the full drape of the robe and the symmetrical arrangement of the hair and hat.
description: A chibi-style doll in a detailed purple robe and bishop hat, holding a gem-topped staff with silver hair in side ponytails.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, ornate hat, staff, and detailed robe patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hat's volume, staff's length, and the side ponytail's flow.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, robe, and symmetrical hair arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the staff's alignment and hair's length.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy-inspired ceremonial robe in deep purple with lavender geometric patterns, wide sleeves, and a tall bishop-style hat with circular motifs, reminiscent of magical or clerical attire in RPG games.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms bent forward, hands grasping a tall staff; head facing forward, legs together, and posture static.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with straight mouth, large blue eyes, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Straight, silver hair cut in blunt bangs with two long side ponytails extending past the shoulders.
